name: The Pale Contract
specialty: A formidable trio known for their expertise in navigating the volatile rifts, offering unique services to clients seeking passage to other realms.

members.name: Sylas Thornwhisper
members.note: A taciturn man with a scar running down his left cheek, a remnant from a near-fatal rift encounter.

members.name: Eira Ironshield
members.note: Her battle-scarred forearms bear the sigil of the defunct Iron Fang Consortium, a constant reminder of her past.

members.name: Zephyr Nightshade
members.note: His iridescent fur shimmers like moonlight, and he's often seen wearing a black leather trench coat, a gift from the Argent Blades.

visual: Clad in weathered leather armor and carrying an assortment of peculiar tools, they move with a purposeful stride through the Undercity. Their distinct clothing and the Tabaxi's ethereal glow make them stand out in the grimy cityscape.
reputation_note: Whispers of their success in traversing the rifts have made them a sought-after crew, but their unaligned status sparks caution among the Undercity's factions.
